values.value: {"id":"opportunity-bundle","label":"Opportunity Bundle","description":"An Opportunity with a generator line and an SLA line, priced from the standard pricebook.","parameters":[{"name":"name","type":"string","required":true},{"name":"closeDate","type":"string","required":true},{"name":"quantity","type":"number","required":false,"default":1}],"nodes":[{"alias":"opp","objectApiName":"Opportunity","op":"create","fields":{"Name":"${name}","StageName":"Prospecting","CloseDate":"${closeDate}"}},{"alias":"line_generator","objectApiName":"OpportunityLineItem","op":"create","parentAlias":"opp","parentField":"OpportunityId","fields":{"ProductCode":"GC104","Quantity":"${quantity|1}"}},{"alias":"line_sla","objectApiName":"OpportunityLineItem","op":"create","parentAlias":"opp","parentField":"OpportunityId","fields":{"ProductCode":"SL9040","Quantity":1}}]}
